content:
# Sseq

**Summary**: An IQA method that uses the joint distribution of local seismic amplitude values and DCT coefficients to assess image quality.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2015-mohammed|Mohammed, 2015]] implemented SSEQ to evaluate the noise and smoothness of various poststack imaging results.

## Instruments and Software



## Typical Workflow



## Key Results and Findings

- SSEQ successfully distinguished between high-quality images and those affected by distortion, correlating with human perception. ([[2015-mohammed|Mohammed, 2015, p. 93]])
